evidence_quotes.quote: protect consumers from losing access to video games they've legally purchased.

paragraphs.text: I strongly support the goals of the Digital Fairness Act. I also believe it should protect consumers from losing access to video games they've legally purchased. Titles like The Crew, NBA 2K20, and Battleborn were made completely unplayable after official shutdowns, even for people who paid full price. The European Citizens Initiative "Stop Killing Games" addresses this problem and already has over a million signatures. Games are paid digital products and should remain accessible after support ends. Please consider including this important consumer right in the Act. Thank you.
